headline: Delta Air Lines (DAL) Might Drop Safran SA, Reports Bloomberg
summary: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) is one of the Most Undervalued Long Term Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 8, Bloomberg reported that Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) might drop Safran SA as the supplier of new business-class suites for critical US transcontinental routes. This decision comes after continuous supply-chain and regulatory delays resulted in stalling the rollout […]

headline: Delta Air Lines (DAL) Stock Could Be 20% Below Fair Value After Liquidity Boost
summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) stock has been in focus after a new undrawn US$2.65b revolving credit facility coincided with optimism around a potential U.S. Iran peace framework and upbeat analyst commentary on earnings prospects. See our latest analysis for Delta Air Lines. Delta Air Lines stock has seen clear positive momentum, with a 19.71% 1 month share price return and a 29.68% 3 month share price return, while the 1 year total shareholder return sits at 72.01%. This suggests that optimism...

headline: Trump Administration Clears Delta in CrowdStrike Outage Probe, Ends Investigation Into Travel Meltdown That Impacted 1.3 Million Passengers
summary: Trump administration cleared Delta in its probe of the 2024 CrowdStrike outage, ending the investigation without penalties.

headline: Low-cost airline cancels all flights to country until October, refunds available
summary: While some signals that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran may finally be close at hand have started to appear, the security situation set off by the U.S.-Israeli strike on Iran in February 2026 continues to limit airlines' ability to fly into the Middle East.
